final_prompt.prompt:
Create a marketing poster for cross-border e-commerce promotion (all in-image text in Chinese).

Style/medium: needs a layered typographic aesthetic with artistic lettering — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be 16:9 aspect ratio, must include font stacking/layering, must have products or main subject partially overlapping/obscuring some text elements, needs complex but non-cluttered visual arrangement — exact layout is yours
Subject: must include e-commerce products as the main subject
Scene/backdrop: 
Lighting/mood: 
Color palette: 
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: must include all in-image text in Chinese by default; must preserve artistic lettering, font stacking, product-subject overlapping text, complex but organized composition, 16:9 ratio
Avoid: must avoid cluttered or messy appearance
